utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: Sweetheart , just gimme ... gimme another chance , okay , we will start all over again . We will go back to Aruba .

utterances.speaker: Bernice
utterances.text: Dr . Farber , we have got a bit of an emergency here ... Jason Costalano is choking on his retainer .

emotion_cause.span: 2_we have got a bit of an emergency here ... Jason Costalano is choking on his retainer .

utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: Oh God ... I will be right there , Bernice .

emotion_cause.span: 2_we have got a bit of an emergency here ... Jason Costalano is choking on his retainer .

utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: Look , please , please do not go anywhere , okay ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , we will be here ! Hating you !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Did you see how he was sweating when he walked out of there ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Listen honey , if I am hogging the ball too much you just jump right in there and take a couple punches because I am telling you , this feels great .

utterances.speaker: Mindy
utterances.text: Yeah ... I am pretty sure I am still gonna marry him .

utterances.text: Mindy , the guy is the devil ! He is Satan in a smock !

utterances.speaker: Mindy
utterances.text: Look , I know he is not perfect .

utterances.speaker: Mindy
utterances.text: But the truth is , at the end of the day , I still really wanna be Mrs . Dr . Barry Farber , D . D . S .

13_I still really wanna be Mrs . Dr . Barry Farber , D . D . S .

utterances.speaker: Mindy
utterances.text: I hope you can find some way to be happy for me . And I hope you will still be my maid of honor .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And I hope Barry does not kill you and eat you in Aruba .
